---
id: update-automation-space
title: "批量更新自动化关联空间"
description: "批量将多个自动化的关联空间设置为指定目标空间。"
sidebar_label: "批量更新自动化关联空间"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"批量更新自动化关联空间"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/automations/space"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



批量将多个自动化的关联空间设置为指定目标空间。
- 未关联空间的自动化将新增关联。
- 已关联其他空间的自动化将替换为目标空间。
- 已关联目标空间的自动化保持不变，直接视为成功。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","automationIds"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"description":"目标空间ID。"},"automationIds":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"description":"待更新空间关联的自动化 ID 列表。","items":{"type":"string"}}},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","automationIds":["auto_01HXYZABCDEF1234567890"]},"title":"UpdateAutomationSpaceRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
